prompt:
Take the FIRST provided reference image (the v9 step 17 — hand from upper-left lowering the protector tube into the DH-branded zip-seal specimen bag with QR code) and reproduce it PIXEL-FAITHFULLY in EVERY element — same hand pose, same bag silhouette and proportions, same parted zip seal, same DIALED HEALTH bag-front logo, same QR code, same tube size and proportions, same composition, same line-art style on pure white background, same line weight, same outlined line-art letter style.

DO NOT change the tube size — the v9 tube proportions are fine. Keep the tube width and height exactly as in the reference.

THE ONLY MODIFICATION — REVERSE THE LETTER ORDER of both words on the protector tube. Currently the letters on each section run in the WRONG ORDER along the tube axis, so reading top-down produces DIALED-backwards (D-E-L-A-I-D) on the cap and HEALTH-backwards (H-T-L-A-E-H) on the body. Flip the text 180° so the FIRST LETTER of each word sits at the TOP of its section and the LAST letter sits at the BOTTOM. After this flip, reading top-down each section spells the word correctly forward:

  • BLACK CAP (top section, pinched by the hand): the word 'DIALED' runs along the tube's axis from TOP to BOTTOM of the cap. The FIRST D sits at the very TOP of the cap (just below where the hand pinches it). Below it, I. Below that, A. Below that, L. Below that, E. The LAST D sits at the bottom of the cap, just above the cap/body seam. Reading top-down on the cap: D, I, A, L, E, D = 'DIALED' forward. Each letter is outlined in thin WHITE strokes against the solid-black cap (line-art outlined letters — interior remains black, not solid white blocks).

  • WHITE BODY (bottom section, lower portion visible faintly through the translucent bag): the word 'HEALTH' runs along the tube's axis from TOP to BOTTOM of the body. The FIRST H sits at the TOP of the body, just below the cap/body seam. Below it, E. Below that, A. Below that, L. Below that, T. The LAST H sits at the bottom of the body, near its base. Reading top-down on the body: H, E, A, L, T, H = 'HEALTH' forward. Each letter is outlined in thin BLACK strokes against the white body (line-art outlined letters — interior remains white, not solid black blocks). The HEALTH letters are drawn muted/faint where the body sits inside the bag, to show through the translucent plastic, but the word remains identifiable as HEALTH.

  • Combined reading top-to-bottom on the upright assembled tube: BLACK CAP showing DIALED (forward, first D at top) → WHITE BODY showing HEALTH (forward, first H at top) = 'DIALED HEALTH' reading linearly top-down, correctly spelled.

  • Each letter is rendered in BOLD SANS-SERIF CAPITAL form as an outlined line-art letter (outline only, no solid fill). Letter orientation matches the v9 reference (running along the tube axis) — the ONLY change is REVERSING the letter sequence so the first letter of each word now sits at the top of its respective section instead of at the bottom.

Do NOT modify anything else — same hand, same bag, same zip seal, same bag-front DH logo, same QR code, same tube size and proportions, same composition, same line weight, same white background, same line-art aesthetic, same outlined letter treatment. The ONLY change vs the reference is the letter sequence on each section: REVERSE it so the first letter of DIALED and the first letter of HEALTH each sit at the TOP of their section.

No frame, no border, no other labels, no numbers, no arrows.
